title: ILOSTAT — Monthly Minimum Wage by Country (local currency and by currency/PPP)
countries: ALL (world; confirmed rows present for IRN, KOR, TUR, SAU, VEN, USA, RUS, ESP, PRT, GRC)
time_coverage: 1980-2025 (Iran: 2001, then continuous 2002-2024; gap 2012-2015 not present in ILO series)
units: EAR_INEE_NOC_NB_A: local currency units, monthly minimum wage. EAR_INEE_CUR_NB_A: same but broken out by classif1 = CUR_TYPE_LCU (local currency) and CUR_TYPE_PPP (PPP-converted).
license_terms: ILOSTAT open data terms (CC BY 4.0 IGO, per ILO data policy)
notes: ILOSTAT indicator EAR_INEE_NOC_NB / EAR_INEE_NB = 'Monthly minimum wage'. ILO compiles this from national legal sources (source field per-country, e.g. Iran source code EB:3479 = Employer-based/official source). Iran (IRN) rows confirmed present: 26 annual observations from 2001-2024 in EAR_INEE_NOC_NB_A.csv (rial figures), e.g. 2024=53,073,300 rial/month, 2023=53,073,300, 2022=26,554,950, 2021=26,554,950, 2020=18,340,000, 2019=15,170,000, 2018=11,112,690, 2017=9,299,310, 2016=9,299,310. Note ILO series has gaps (e.g. no 2012-2015 rows) and some years show the same wage repeated (reflecting no policy change within a Persian calendar year that spans two Gregorian years, or a mid-2021 vs full-2022 rate). This full-world file was kept whole (natural bulk-download unit; not excessively large) per bookkeeping size discipline rather than country-filtered. Cross-reference against the hand-compiled Supreme Labor Council series in data/raw/iran-labor-council/minimum-wage-history/ for the authoritative year-by-year figures — the two series should be checked against each other for discrepancies (ILO's IRR figures appear to reflect the OLD rial pre-2025 redenomination and pre-2025 rate hikes may differ from Trading-Economics or Iranian press figures for the same year due to differing wage components, e.g. base wage vs. base+allowances).
